hero.eyebrow: Trusted Transport Partner — Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
hero.title: Powering KSA's Industries, One Delivery at a Time
hero.subtitle: Jameela hussain delivers Aramco fuels, water, and construction materials across the Kingdom with a premium fleet of Mercedes Actros tankers.

fuel.title: Fuel Transport
fuel.desc: Petrol 91, 95, Diesel and Kerosene from Aramco terminals to petrol stations across KSA.

water.title: Water Tanker Delivery
water.desc: Reliable potable & industrial water delivery via certified water tanker fleet.

rental.title: Tanker Rental
rental.desc: Diesel, benzine, and water tankers available for short and long-term rental.

construction.title: Construction Materials
construction.desc: Sand, aggregate, cement, and bulk material delivery to building sites.

bulk.title: Bulk Logistics
bulk.desc: Heavy-duty Mercedes MP4 & MP5 trucks for long-haul bulk transport.

emergency.title: 24/7 Emergency Supply
emergency.desc: Round-the-clock dispatch for urgent fuel and water needs.

about.title: About Jameela Hussain
about.lead: A Saudi-owned transport company built on safety, reliability, and the highest fleet standards.
about.p1: Jameela Hussain is a Saudi Arabian transport and logistics company specializing in the safe transport of petroleum products, water supply, and construction materials. We operate a modern fleet of Mercedes-Benz Actros MP4 and MP5 tankers that meet the strictest Aramco safety standards.
about.p2: From Aramco terminals to petrol stations (mahatat), industrial sites, and construction projects across the Kingdom, our drivers and dispatch team work around the clock to keep your operations moving.
about.missionText: To deliver fuel, water, and materials with uncompromising safety and on-time precision.
about.visionText: To be the most trusted private transport partner of Aramco and KSA's industrial sector.
about.valuesText: Safety first, integrity, reliability, and partnership.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Premium Mercedes-Benz Actros tankers built for the Kingdom

mp5.title: Mercedes Actros MP5
mp5.desc: Latest-generation tractor heads with advanced safety, telematics, and fuel efficiency.

mp4.title: Mercedes Actros MP4
mp4.desc: Proven workhorse for long-haul fuel and water transport across Saudi Arabia.

fuelTanker.title: Fuel Tankers
fuelTanker.desc: Multi-compartment tankers compliant with Aramco loading standards.

waterTanker.title: Water Tankers
waterTanker.desc: Stainless-steel potable water tankers and large-capacity industrial units.

industries.title: Industries We Serve
industries.subtitle: Trusted by leaders across Saudi Arabia

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Jameela Hussain website and any transportation, logistics, fuel transportation, water delivery, tanker rental, and related services offered by Jameela Hussain within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing our website, requesting quotations, submitting forms, or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

services.title: Services
services.content: Jameela Hussain provides transportation and logistics solutions including but not limited to fuel transportation, water tanker delivery, tanker rental services, construction material transport, bulk logistics services, and emergency transportation support.

quotes.title: Quotes and Pricing
quotes.content: All quotations provided through the website are estimates only and do not constitute a binding agreement until confirmed by Jameela Hussain.

customer.title: Customer Responsibilities
customer.content: Customers agree to provide accurate information when requesting services, submitting forms, or communicating with Jameela Hussain.

safety.title: Safety and Compliance
safety.content: Jameela Hussain operates under applicable safety standards and industry regulations. Services may be delayed, suspended, or canceled when safety concerns or regulatory restrictions arise.

website.title: Website Usage
website.content: Users may not submit false information, attempt unauthorized access, use the website for unlawful purposes, or interfere with website operations.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All website content, branding, logos, images, and text remain the property of Jameela Hussain unless otherwise stated.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Jameela Hussain shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the website or services.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: Jameela Hussain reserves the right to update these Terms of Service at any time.

law.title: Governing Law
law.content: These Terms shall be governed by the laws and regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: For questions regarding these Terms, please contact Jameela Hussain through the contact information provided on our website.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Jameela Hussain respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect your name, email address, phone number, company name, job application information, quote requests, contact messages, and website usage data.

usage.title: How We Use Information
usage.content: Information may be used to respond to inquiries, provide quotations, process applications, improve services, and comply with legal obligations.

security.title: Data Storage and Security
security.content: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal information.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: Jameela Hussain does not sell personal information. Information may be shared when required by law or necessary for business operations.

careers.title: Job Applications
careers.content: Information submitted through career applications is used solely for recruitment and employment evaluation.

cookies.title: Cookies and Analytics
cookies.content: Our website may use cookies and analytics tools to improve user experience and monitor website performance.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We may use third-party providers for hosting, analytics, communications, and website operations.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Personal information is retained only as long as necessary for legal, operational, and business purposes.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Subject to applicable Saudi laws, you may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information where legally permitted.

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact Jameela Hussain  using the details available on our website.
